System Dependencies

Name Usage Description
Ubuntu
RHEL
Debian
macOS
OpenEmbedded
xpath-perl 5 Perl module for processing XPath
xsimd 3
xsltproc 0 XSLT 1.0 command line processor
xtensor 3 multi-dimensional arrays with broadcasting and lazy computing
xterm 13 X terminal emulator
xulrunner-1.9.2 0
xulrunner-dev 0
xvfb 3 Virtual Framebuffer 'fake' X server
xz-utils 1 XZ-format compression utilities
yaml 12 Fast YAML 1.1 parser and emitter library (development)
yaml-cpp 17 YAML parser and emitter for C++ - development files
yamllint 0 Linter for YAML files
yapf 0
yapf3 0 Python code formatter for different styles (Python 3)
yarn 0 Fast, reliable and secure npm alternative
yasm 6 modular assembler with multiple syntaxes support
zbar 11 QR code / bar code scanner and decoder (development)
zenity 0 Display graphical dialog boxes from shell scripts
zeromq3 0 lightweight messaging kernel (shared library)
zip 0 Archiver for .zip files
zlib 17 compression library - development
zsh 0 shell with lots of features
zstd 0
zulip-pip 0
zziplib 2 library providing read access on ZIP-archives - development
